news.headline: China central bank injects 474 billion yuan via 7-day reverse repos at 1.50%: statement
Brooklyn DA closes 40 NFT scam sites following artist's $135K loss, uncovering a network of fraud.
news.summary: An examination of a victim of an NFT scam by the Brooklyn District Attorney’s Virtual Currency Unit uncovered a network of counterfeit NFT marketplace sites. The investigation revealed the existence of multiple fraudulent platforms, with a total of approximately 25 fake sites identified and dismantled.

news.headline: Rangebank Battery Energy Storage System in Australia opened with capacity to power 80,000 homes in Victoria for an hour.
news.summary: The newly introduced Rangebank storage system is set to enhance grid stability by providing sufficient storage capacity to supply energy for up to 80,000 households in Victoria for one hour during peak times. This initiative aims to bolster the resilience of the power grid and ensure reliable electricity supply during periods of high demand.

news.headline: Apple to launch online store in Saudi Arabia in summer 2025 and open flagship retail stores starting in 2026.
news.summary: Apple has revealed intentions to broaden its presence in Saudi Arabia with the introduction of the Apple Store® online set to debut in summer 2025. The online platform will cater to customers throughout Saudi Arabia, offering access to Apple’s complete product lineup along with dedicated support in Arabic provided by Apple. Following this, in 2026, Apple will initiate the rollout of multiple flagship Apple Store locations in Saudi Arabia to enhance the retail experience for consumers.

news.headline: Disc Med presented positive Phase 1b trial results at ASH annual meeting, showing DISC-0974 in MF patients reduces hepcidin, increases iron levels resulting in improved anemia measures.
news.summary: In Watertown, Massachusetts on December 08, 2024, Disc Medicine, Inc. (NASDAQ: IRON), a company specializing in treatments for hematologic diseases, shared promising findings from a Phase 1b trial of DISC-0974 at the 2024 American Society of Hematology (ASH) annual meeting in San Diego, CA. The study focused on patients with myelofibrosis (MF) and anemia, showing that DISC-0974 led to significant decreases in hepcidin and increases in iron levels. These outcomes had a positive impact on anemia measures in a diverse range of patients.

news.headline: Jacobio Pharma presented preliminary Phase I data of BET inhibitor JAB-8263 for myelofibrosis at 2024 ASH conference.
news.summary: Jacobio Pharma, a company focused on developing therapies for previously untreatable targets, shared initial Phase I findings for BET inhibitor JAB-8263 aimed at treating myelofibrosis (MF). The presentation took place at the 2024 event in Beijing, Shanghai, and Boston. Jacobio Pharma is listed as 1167.HK and continues to advance in the oncology field.

news.headline: Albanese faces close battle in 2025 election in Australia, polls reveal.

CS5001 presents promising data at 66th ASH Annual Meeting - safety & efficacy for lymphoma patients, first ADC with anti-tumor activity in solid tumors & lymphomas. Well tolerated in heavily treated patients.
news.summary: CS5001, the initial anti-ROR1 ADC ever reported to demonstrate clinical anti-tumor effects in solid tumors and lymphomas. Recent findings shared at ASH showcased the newest safety and efficacy data of CS5001 when used alone in treating advanced lymphomas. Patients have shown good tolerance to CS5001, making it promising for further studies in heavily impacted cases.

news.headline: Innovent presents data on anti-CLDN18.2 ADC Phase 1 study for pancreatic cancer at ESMO Asia Congress 2024.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, in a joint announcement from San Francisco and Suzhou, China, Innovent Biologics, Inc. revealed its latest developments. Innovent, listed as HKEX: 01801, is a renowned biopharmaceutical entity specializing in the production and distribution of top-tier medications targeting oncology, cardiovascular issues, and metabolic conditions.

Nasdaq nears 20,000 as risks rise; 4 tech giants show buy signals. Dow Jones Futures update by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The Nasdaq index is close to reaching the significant 20,000 level but is showing signs of being overextended. Currently, four major technology companies are showing indicators suggesting it is a good time to buy their stocks. This information was featured in an article titled "Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Near 20,000 But Risks Mount; Nvidia, Meta In Buy Zones."

Trump stated he has no intention to replace Jerome Powell as Fed Chair, affirming his confidence in Powell's leadership.
news.summary: The president-elect, Donald J. Trump, indicated that he does not intend to remove the head of America's central bank when questioned about it.

NGO suggests transferring Bitcoin treasury to Amazon due to MicroStrategy's 537% outperformance of Amazon's stock.
news.summary: According to a report from the National Center for Public Policy, MicroStrategy's stock has seen a significant outperformance compared to Amazon's stock. The increase stands at an impressive 537%, which is attributed to MicroStrategy's strategic approach towards Bitcoin. This indicates a strong market response to MicroStrategy's Bitcoin strategy, leading to a substantial growth in the company's stock value.
